title: Mudhalvane Lyrics Mudhalvan
stanzas:
oh kadhal panjam vandhu
nondhene mutha nivaranam
enakkilaiyaa

Vaalin oasai ketkum thalaivaa
valaiyal oasai kaetkavillaiyaa
mudhalva..mudhalva.

Konja neram odhukki
koondhal odhukki
kurippu ezhuthungal
endhan tholil

ulagam vazha nidhi odhukku
en uyirum vazha madi odhukku
arasan vazha vidhi irukku
adharku neethaan vidhivilakku

mudhalva va va
mudhalva mudhalva va va
mudhalva mudhalva va va
mudhalva mudhalva va
Mudhalva..

Vaalin oasai ketkum thalaivaa
valaiyal oasai kaetkavillaiyaa

pallivaasal thirnadhaai
palli thirandhaai
palli arai vara neramillaiya

oh ooradangu thalarthi
varigal thalarthi
udaigal thalarthida
vendum illaiyaa

aasai poovai thavikkavittu
amaicharodu nagarvalamo
unadhu kannin neer thudaithal
oor kulaayil neer varumo

mudhalva va va
mudhalva mudhalva va va
mudhalva mudhalva va va
mudhalva mudhalva va
Mudhalva..

Vaalin oasai theerum podhu
valaiyal oasai kaetkavarum

seo.title: Mudhalvane Lyrics Mudhalvan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mudhalvane?

The song Mudhalvane expresses themes of love and longing, reflecting the emotional journey of the characters in the movie Mudhalvan.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Mudhalvan, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's feelings of love and commitment.

Who are the singers of Mudhalvane?

The song features the beautiful voices of S Janaki and Shankar Mahadevan, both renowned artists in the Tamil music industry.

Who composed the music for Mudhalvane?

The music for Mudhalvane was composed by the legendary AR Rahman, known for his innovative sound and compositions.

When was Mudhalvane released?

Mudhalvane was released on November 7, 1999, and has since become a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mudhalvane, the song encapsulates the essence of love through its heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody. The duet, performed by S Janaki and Shankar Mahadevan, conveys a deep sense of nostalgia and longing, perfectly complementing the romantic narrative of Mudhalvan. The composition by AR Rahman enhances the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema. This song resonates with anyone who has experienced the beauty and complexity of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mudhalvane from Mudhalvan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of S Janaki and Shankar Mahadevan, paired with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the nostalgia and romance that makes Mudhalvane a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.

Oh love, I have been affected by it, is there no remedy for me?
I hear the sound of life, but I don't hear the sound of the trap, Mudhalva.. Mudhalva.
Mudhalvane, Mudhalvane, Mudhalvane, Mudhalvane, Mudhalvane.
Take some time to write down your thoughts and feelings about my work.
Taking one, I will mix it with honey and give it to you in your hands.
The world has a way to live, my life has a way to live, the king has a way to live, and you are the light of that way.
Oh earth, here she is for you.

Will it come, will it come, that blessing?
Mudhalva, come, Mudhalva, Mudhalva, come, Mudhalva, Mudhalva, come, Mudhalva, Mudhalva, come, Mudhalva, Mudhalva, come, Mudhalva..
